coordinate_convention: Habcdef.SHI uses six yao bits from bottom to top; 1=yang, 0=yin; SHI is JI/JIN/WEI.

operators.effect: 卦象不变，时态按 已→今→未→已 前进。
operators.name: 时态前进

operators.effect: 卦象不变，时态按 已←今←未←已 后退。
operators.name: 时态后退

operators.effect: 六爻上下反序，保持时态。
operators.name: 综卦

operators.effect: 取二三四、三四五成互卦，保持时态。
operators.name: 互卦
